narrative:
Jacksonville (precinct in Athens County) has 283 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 9.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 38.9%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 29.3 percentage points.
